field.name: rule_ids
field.eval:
[ # Basic Salary ref('hr_rule_basic_salary'),
# Additions (45-75) ref('hr_rule_overtime_addition'), ref('hr_rule_taxable_transport_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_position_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_house_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_non_taxable_transport_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_hardship_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_risk_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_other_allowances'),
# Gross Salary Calculation ref('hr_rule_gross_salary'),
# Deductions (105-125) ref('hr_rule_oil_deduction'), ref('hr_rule_loan_advance_deduction'), ref('hr_rule_penalty_deduction'), ref('hr_rule_medical_insurance_deduction'), ref('hr_rule_provident_fund_deduction'), ref('hr_rule_tax_deduction'), ref('hr_rule_other_deductions'),
# Net Salary Calculation ref('hr_rule_net_salary'), ]

field.name: rule_ids
field.eval:
[ # Basic Salary ref('hr_rule_basic_salary'),
# Additions only ref('hr_rule_overtime_addition'), ref('hr_rule_taxable_transport_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_position_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_house_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_non_taxable_transport_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_hardship_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_risk_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_other_allowances'),
# Gross Salary Calculation ref('hr_rule_gross_salary'),
# Net Salary Calculation (no deductions) ref('hr_rule_net_salary'), ]

field.name: rule_ids
field.eval:
[ # Basic Salary ref('hr_rule_basic_salary'),
# Essential Additions ref('hr_rule_overtime_addition'), ref('hr_rule_position_allowance'), ref('hr_rule_house_allowance'),
# Gross Salary Calculation ref('hr_rule_gross_salary'),
# Essential Deductions ref('hr_rule_oil_deduction'), ref('hr_rule_loan_advance_deduction'),
# Net Salary Calculation ref('hr_rule_net_salary'), ]
